claimText: The Samudrayaan Mission is slated for launch by the end of 2026 by the National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT).
evidenceExcerpt: The Samudrayaan Mission will be launched by the end of 2026 by NIOT.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the implementing agency and timeline of the Samudrayaan Mission.

claimText: Indian aquanauts recently conducted a dive of over 5,000 meters in the Atlantic Ocean aboard the French submersible Nautile in collaboration with IFREMER.
evidenceExcerpt: Indian aquanauts recently dived up to 5,002 meters in the Atlantic Ocean. The dive was conducted aboard the French submersible Nautile in collaboration with France's IFREMER.
examUse: Statement-based question on India's international collaborations and recent milestones in deep-ocean exploration.

claimText: Only the U.S., Russia, China, France, and Japan have previously carried out successful deep-ocean crewed missions.
evidenceExcerpt: Only the U.S., Russia, China, France, and Japan have previously carried out successful deep-ocean crewed missions.
examUse: Statement-based question assessing India's global standing and the exclusive group of nations with deep-ocean crewed mission capabilities.
distractorHooks: India is the first developing nation
India is the third nation globally
